subcodes.first_line: O thou attracted maidservant of God! The celebration of the Feast of Naw-Rúz made me glad….  Surely, all must today be called to love, to unity and to kindness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المنجذبه از جشن عید نوروز مسرور شدم ملاحظه نما که این انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @being a source of light; guidance, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love and unity, @growth of the Cause
